function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"summary": "Generated BDD scenarios for team-execution", "deliverable": {"scenarios": [{"given": "valid username and password credentials are provided", "when": "POST /auth/login is called", "then": ["a 200 response is returned", "the response body contains a valid JWT token string"]}, {"given": "an invalid or expired JWT token is provided in the Authorization header", "when": "a protected endpoint is accessed", "then": ["a 401 Unauthorized response is returned", "the response body contains an error message"]}]}}
